markdown:
#  Edit a Commitment Change Order Linked to a Potential Change Order for a Prime Contract 
##  Background 
If you are working with a prime potential change order, you can change the status of an associated commitment potential change order or you can updatee the amount of the commitment change order line item.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Prime Contracts tool.
  * **Requirements** :
    * The Change Events tool MUST be disabled to use these steps.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Commitment Change Order from a Prime Contract Change Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-a-commitment-change-order-from-a-prime-contract-change-order)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Prime Contracts** tool.
  2. Locate the contract to work with. Then click its **Number** link.
  3. Locate the potential change order with the linked commitment change order to edit. Then click **View**.
  4. Click the **Schedule of Values** tab.
  5. Click **Edit**.
  6. Click the **Status** or **Commitment Amount** columns to edit what is shown there. 
#####  Note
     * A blue caret in the corner of a cell indicates you can edit the column inline.
     * The Commitment Amount column cannot be edited in the 'Approved' status.
![Edit Table Field Text](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d9ee46d164119ea00ed50e8267594198/5be5ea1d28c1c9570472a28309b32300/edit-table-field-text.png?fm=webp)  

  7. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Prime Contracts - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/permissions)
  * [How are financial line items and budget codes updated across change objects?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-are-financial-line-items-and-budget-codes-updated-across-change-objects)
  * [What values pull into a change order SOV from a change event?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-values-pull-into-a-change-order-sov-from-a-change-event)
title: Edit a Commitment Change Order Linked to a Potential Change Order for a Prime Contract
description: How to edit a commitment change order linked to a potential change order for a prime contract.
